sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: article title here
feed.summary: brief 2-3 sentence summary of the article

feed.title: Johnson & Johnson halts mid-stage trial of experimental eczema drug
feed.summary: Johnson & Johnson has discontinued a mid-stage study of its experimental eczema drug, JNJ-5939, after it failed to meet efficacy goals. Despite being well-tolerated, the drug did not achieve the required efficacy for further development in treating moderate to severe atopic dermatitis. The company remains committed to developing other treatments for the chronic skin condition.

feed.title: Equity Residential $EQR Shares Sold by Voya Investment Management LLC

feed.title: A Strong Growth Profile Gives Boston Scientific Corp. (BSX) a Favorable Outlook
feed.summary: Hardman Johnston Global Advisors' Q3 2025 investor letter highlighted a favorable outlook for Boston Scientific Corporation (NYSE: BSX) due to its diversified growth profile across cardiology, electrophysiology, endoscopy, and urology. Despite recent underperformance linked to macroeconomic uncertainty and a shift in healthcare investment, the company's strong pricing power and increased U.S. manufacturing position it well to mitigate potential tariffs. Management's consistent track record suggests upside to new long-term targets including 10% organic revenue growth and double-digit EPS growth through 2028.

feed.title: Carrier Global (CARR) Sold Off Due to Guidance Cut
feed.summary: Impax Asset Management's "Impax Global Environmental Markets Fund" reported that Carrier Global Corporation (CARR) saw a sell-off in Q3 2025 due to a material guidance cut caused by weaker US residential HVAC volumes. Despite the softer demand outlook, the fund believes Carrier remains an attractively priced business poised to benefit from improving end-market demand. Carrier Global's stock declined 1.58% in one month and 22.97% over 52 weeks, closing at $53.50 per share with a market capitalization of $45.53 billion on December 24, 2025.

feed.title: Amazon (NASDAQ: AMZN) Stock Price Prediction in 2030: Bull, Bear, & Baseline Forecasts (Dec 26)
feed.summary: This article provides bull, bear, and baseline stock price predictions for Amazon (NASDAQ: AMZN) in 2030, considering factors like e-commerce dominance, Amazon Web Services (AWS) growth, and advertising revenue. The bull case projects $431 per share, the bear case $77, and the baseline $250. The analysis details key drivers and potential challenges for each scenario, emphasizing future profitability across its core business segments.

feed.title: Capital One to pay $9.6 million to settle a lawsuit over employer-match forfeiture policy
feed.summary: Capital One has agreed to pay $9.6 million to settle a lawsuit concerning its employer-match forfeiture policy. The settlement addresses a specific policy that led to legal action against the company. This resolution comes after allegations regarding how Capital One handled employer contributions to employee retirement plans.

feed.title: J&J eczema therapy fails in mid-stage trial (JNJ:NYSE)

The trial's results for the atopic dermatitis treatment did not meet expectations, impacting investor confidence.

feed.title: Here's How Apple (AAPL) Impacted Harbor Capital Appreciation Fund
feed.summary: Harbor Capital Appreciation Fund, in its Q3 2025 investor letter, highlighted Apple Inc. (NASDAQ: AAPL) but noted that its underweight position in Apple negatively affected relative returns despite the company's strong iPhone sales. The fund sees greater upside potential and less downside risk in certain AI stocks compared to Apple, even with Apple's strong revenue growth. Apple's stock price benefited from a new, higher-priced iPhone lineup generating strong demand.

feed.title: Thermo Fisher Scientific to hold earnings conference call on Thursday, January 29, 2026
feed.summary: Thermo Fisher Scientific Inc. (TMO) will hold an earnings conference call on Thursday, January 29, 2026. The article also provides recent news regarding the company, including product launches, analyst rating adjustments, and insider share transactions.

feed.title: Pomerantz LLP Issues Reminder to Shareholders in Perrigo Company plc of Class Action Filing – PRGO
feed.summary: Pomerantz LLP has announced a class action lawsuit against Perrigo Company plc (NYSE:PRGO), reminding shareholders who purchased securities during the Class Period to seek lead plaintiff status by January 16, 2026. The lawsuit stems from significant financial impacts and stock declines following revelations of substantial acquisition and integration-related charges, particularly concerning its infant formula business remediations and a strategic review of that division. Shareholders are encouraged to contact the firm for more information.

feed.title: SanDisk Stock SNDK News Today: Price, Forecasts, Analyst Targets and What to Watch on December 26, 2025
feed.summary: SanDisk Corporation's stock (NASDAQ: SNDK) is ending 2025 trading at $250.08, up 2.12%, driven by the AI-driven storage demand and benefiting from its separation from Western Digital. The market narrative on December 26, 2025, is primarily influenced by Micron's strength boosting the memory sector, bullish options activity, and SanDisk's recognition as a top performer for 2025. While some analysts see it as undervalued with strong earnings potential due to datacenter demand, others view it as overheated, priced for perfection in a cyclical industry.

feed.title: Precision Wealth Strategies LLC Purchases New Position in TTM Technologies, Inc. $TTMI

This move is part of a broader trend of institutional investors boosting their stakes in the company, with hedge funds and institutional investors now owning 95.79% of the stock. Analysts have largely given TTM Technologies a "Buy" rating, setting an average price target of $76.50, following strong Q3 earnings and optimistic Q4 guidance.

feed.title: Sasol stock struggles for direction as investors weigh cyclical risk against transition promise
feed.summary: Sasol's share price has been struggling, reflecting investor concerns over chemicals cyclicality, energy prices, and the cost of its transition roadmap. The stock is down significantly compared to a year ago, underperforming broader markets. Analyst sentiment is cautious, with most recommendations being "Hold" due to limited visibility on free cash flow despite reduced balance sheet risk.

feed.title: Tune Into the SueWallSt Podcast: Synopsys, Inc. (SNPS) Lawsuit Explained
feed.summary: Levi & Korsinsky, LLP has released a podcast detailing a class action securities lawsuit against Synopsys, Inc. (NASDAQ: SNPS). The lawsuit alleges that Synopsys made false statements and concealed information regarding the negative impact of its focus on AI customers on its Design IP business, leading to a decline in financial results. Investors who lost money between December 4, 2024, and September 9, 2025, are encouraged to contact Levi & Korsinsky.

feed.title: NetApp Honors Top Partners in India at Partner Summit 2025
feed.summary: NetApp announced the winners of its India Partner Awards for Fiscal Year 2025, celebrating partners who excelled in delivering NetApp solutions for AI, cyber resilience, data infrastructure modernization, and cloud transformation. These awards recognize partners' crucial role in driving NetApp's vision and strategy amidst India's projected US$126.8 billion digital transformation market by 2033, and highlight their commitment to customer success and innovation.

feed.title: Is Mark Millar Out Of His Netflix Contract? Millarworld Speculation…
feed.summary: Industry speculation suggests Mark Millar may no longer be under contract with Netflix, evidenced by his independent crowdfunded comics, Psychic Sam and Conquered, and limited new activity for Millarworld titles on Netflix. The renaming of his company to Mark Millar Productions also hints at ambitious future projects outside of his previous Netflix agreement. These developments, alongside a rumored million-dollar contract termination in January, point towards a significant shift in Millar's professional arrangements.

feed.title: United States Semaglutide Market Forecast and Company Analysis Report 2025-2033 Featuring Novo Nordisk, Eli Lilly and Co, AstraZeneca, Biocon, Johnson and Johnson, Pfizer, AbbVie, and Sanofi - ResearchAndMarkets.com
feed.summary: The U.S. semaglutide market is projected to grow from US$ 8.17 billion in 2024 to US$ 17.29 billion by 2033, driven by increasing awareness of obesity control, a rise in diabetes incidence, and expanded applications in weight management. Despite strong physician-patient acceptance, challenges include high costs, limited insurance coverage for obesity, and persistent supply shortages. Key players in this growing market include Novo Nordisk, Eli Lilly and Company, and AstraZeneca.

feed.title: Conagra Brands embracing AI
feed.summary: Conagra Brands has launched "project catalyst," an initiative leveraging AI and other new technologies to transform operations and drive efficiency. President and CEO Sean Connolly stated this multi-year effort will reimagine manual processes and connect employees with cutting-edge technology. The company plans to provide updates on the project's progress as fiscal 2026 unfolds, focusing on re-engineering core business processes.
